estimators.name: Dale Frandsen
estimators.title: Senior Estimator
personalization_hooks: Senior Estimator at a 70+ year Winnipeg institution — Dale is the bid-list owner.
WBD scope = insurance restoration + commercial reno + new construction. Insurance restoration jobs are high-frequency/repeatable painting work — strong fit for Ashrah.
Email format pgbldg.com / wpgbldg.com — likely dale@wpgbldg.com or dfrandsen@wpgbldg.com (verify).
WBD founded 1953 by Donald T. MacAngus — heritage-firm gravitas; Ahmad's 'protect your reputation' framing fits their identity.

sources.claim: Dale Frandsen, Senior Estimator, Winnipeg Building & Decorating, email format ****@pgbldg.com
